changes.summary: New resource for managing business rules decision tables.
No longer required; callable time sets can be managed without specifying callable_times blocks.
Plans now show complete to on transitions, allowing completed campaigns to be re-enabled.
Updates to other attributes preserve the live campaign_status from Genesys Cloud instead of sending the Terraform state value.
Destroy reads current campaign status from the API; only on campaigns are turned off before deletion, with longer waits while stopping campaigns finish.
Destroy attempts an architect dependency-tracking database rebuild before deletion; rebuild failures are logged but deletion still proceeds.
Accepts additional locale codes pt-PT, he, hi (beta) and ar, uk (alpha); description documents beta and alpha languages.
Validation accepts E.164 pool numbers that may exceed country-specific length limits, but the value must match the correctly formatted E.164 form.
Validation accepts E.164 pool numbers that may exceed country-specific length limits, but the value must match the correctly formatted E.164 form.
Uses the same relaxed pool-range E.164 validation as the resource.
Uses the same relaxed pool-range E.164 validation as the resource.
When not using the legacy architect flow exporter, exported flow configurations may be more complete because sanitized flow data is preserved during export.
